headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Lakers flip odds on Rockets, Thunder the odds-on favorites
headlines.description: The Thunder have achieved odds-on title favorite status, but it is the Lakers whose odds are rocketing after taking a 2-0 lead on Houston

headlines.headline: France to host 2031 hoops World Cup, Japan gets 2030 women's event
headlines.description: Victor Wembanyama will have a chance to play a home World Cup in 2031. France was awarded the hosting rights to the 2031 men's tournament by basketball's governing body FIBA on Wednesday, with Japan getting the 2030 Women's World Cup.
